provider_source.source_of_truth_boundary: AOF export package is canonical runtime evidence; provider-native stream is input evidence only.

event_summaries.summary: AOF chose v7.8 Mission Control projection as the nearest release target.
AOF ran Mission Control projection audit and release evidence commands.
Projection schema, command, docs, and runtime evidence artifacts were written.
Release verification gates are recorded in v7.8 checklist.
No active blocker remains after projection compatibility fixes; release still stops if audit gates fail.
Stop v7.8 release if projection audit or release-state audit fails.

risk_candidates: Projection can still be visually insufficient even if data projection is correct.
decision_candidates: Move v8.0 toward externalized organization runtime after v7.8 visibility evidence projection is shipped.

redaction_boundary: No secrets or provider-native raw transcript are included; local summary artifacts are canonical evidence.
release_ready_boundary: Release readiness requires audits and tests; session export alone is not a release-ready verdict.
not_proven: Session export proves reconstructable process summary, not semantic correctness or operator acceptance.
